keyFindings.description: runGhCommand awaits proc.exited before reading stdout — potential pipe deadlock for large outputs. Should read streams concurrently before awaiting exit, matching fetch.ts:defaultRunner pattern.
relay_user_feedback action falls through to default prompt case — worker dispatched without knowing it should look for user feedback in issue comments.
remove_worker_active_and_redispatch handles redispatch but never removes the worker-active label — the action name explicitly requires both.
parseIssueIdParts is lossy for hyphenated GitHub owners, and transitionIssue/removeLabel don't receive IssueSource from cachedState — will target wrong repo for orgs with hyphens.
transition_to_done omitted from AUTO_ADVANCE_ACTIONS set — issues may stall after retro if auto-advance is expected to fully automate lifecycle.
Envoy fast-path for auto-progression (subscribe to worker-done events) not implemented — deferred to polling fallback only, adding up to 60s latency.
